meta.title: Vectorline | Context Before Canvas
meta.description: Vectorline turns planning sessions into annotated structures: live frames, spatial notes, asset references, ownership signals, and route-level context rendered in one calm workspace.

common.menuDescription: Navigate to a section of the Vectorline console.

hero.description: Vectorline turns planning sessions into annotated structures: live frames, spatial notes, asset references, ownership signals, and route-level context rendered in one calm workspace.

topology.title: Frame Topology
topology.description: Uncovering 624 hidden data vectors for decisions.

architecture.title: Core Architecture Mapping
architecture.description: Distributed network topology utilizing isometric spatial consensus and multi-tier cryptographic layers.

lattice.title: Quantum Lattice Array
lattice.description: Military-grade isometric encryption protocols ensuring zero-knowledge spatial security across all nodes.

consensus.title: Distributed Node Consensus
consensus.description: Automated propagation and validation of credentials across the decentralized subnet. Eliminates single points of failure.

access.title: Multi-Tenant Access Control
access.description: Granular role-based permissions governing secure inter-team structural sharing and logic segregation.

audit.title: Immutable Audit Trails
audit.description: Continuous cryptographic logging of all volumetric operations, stored in non-volatile structural arrays.

signals.title: A workspace with measurable intent.
signals.description: Every object carries state, ownership, and history. Instead of scattered sticky notes, the console exposes how ideas connect and where decisions are slowing down.

assets.title: Five candidate visuals indexed for the board.

abstractWave.title: Abstract wave
abstractWave.alt: Abstract neon light wave on black

glassHabitat.title: Glass habitat
glassHabitat.alt: Modern glass villa at dusk in lush landscape

studioSubject.title: Studio subject
studioSubject.alt: Studio portrait of woman with striking blue eyes

protocol.title: From workshop noise to structured output.
protocol.description: Use frames as containers, attach assets as evidence, assign paths to owners, then export a decision map with the metadata still intact.

capture.title: Capture signals
capture.description: Import sketches, notes, product screenshots, and reference visuals without flattening context.

connect.title: Connect dependencies
connect.description: Route issues, assumptions, and commitments through visible relationship lines.

export.title: Export decisions
export.description: Generate a clean spec trail for stakeholders, engineering, design, and operations.

deployment.title: Push structural changes directly to production.
deployment.description: Export decision vectors seamlessly. Vectorline generates ready-to-deploy metadata that syncs directly with your existing pipeline and infrastructure.

footer.blurb: Vectorline turns planning sessions into annotated structures: live frames, spatial notes, and route-level context rendered in one workspace.
